body:
We're showing the American people that and we're growing stronger with every debate.
# [](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf210a4/1630b3eb/511b5ebf/5f554bbf/760729180/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5NyJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_postdebate?refcode=697_org_em_fr")
Friend --
Last night, I vowed to tax the hell out of the super rich and put money back in the hands of working people. We now have the furthest-reaching plan for taxing extreme wealth of any candidate in this Democratic primary.
For years, we've watched Donald Trump pit working people against each other: black versus white, citizens versus immigrants. And why? **So the wealthy and powerful can continue to hold the American Dream hostage for everyone but themselves.**
We can't let them get away with it. And we aren't -- we're working together to build a campaign that can stop them. We're showing the American people what we're going to do, and we're growing stronger with every debate.
**[Watch me call out Donald Trump at last night's Democratic debate now and contribute $1 to help keep building this campaign.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf210a4/1630b3eb/511b5ebf/5f554bbf/760729180/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5NyJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_postdebate?refcode=697_org_em_fr")**
[](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf210a4/1630b3eb/511b5ebf/5f554bbf/760729180/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5NyJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_postdebate?refcode=697_org_em_fr")
We're ready to unite working Americans to fight for their fair share. I know we're a target after standing up against the top 1% and corporations on the debate stage. But if there's one thing my experience in New York City shows, it's that we can still get things done if we push right past the doubters and naysayers.
To beat Donald Trump, we need to be bold. We need to be the party of labor unions, we need to be the party of universal health care, and we need to be the party that is not afraid to say that we're going to tax the hell out of the wealthy. And we need to keep building this campaign.
**[Contribute $1 today to help keep building this campaign.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf210a4/1630b3eb/511b5ebf/5f554bbf/760729180/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5NyJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_postdebate?refcode=697_org_em_fr")**
Thank you for working with us so we can put working people first in America!
Let's do this,
Bill de Blasio

subject: the man for the job
body:

Yesterday, Jim delivered one of the most important speeches of the campaign at the Neshoba County Fair, and the contrast between Jim and our opposition couldn't be more clear.
Friend,

Yesterday, Jim delivered one of the most important speeches of the campaign at the Neshoba County Fair, and the contrast between Jim and our opposition couldn't be more clear.

As attorney general, Jim has dedicated his career to fighting for Mississippi families -- fighting illegal corruption, holding polluters accountable, putting criminals and child molesters behind bars, and taking on big corporations and special interests that have preyed on the people of Mississippi.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/LzhLvpsLVJACNbXqG7yED-L4rFCX5cMzg83pjuS8i-s=/425KPG99OYo_ZNconKhHRNrn41s6RkMeY0BYBUIclb8=?refcode=20190802nd&amount=10)

He will prioritize weeding out the legal corruption in our state government -- the insider deals in Jackson that cost you money and hold the state of Mississippi back. Jim's plan is clear -- invest in our public schools and teachers, save our rural hospitals, fix our roads and bridges, and roll back the grocery tax.

**Can you chip in to help amplify Jim 's message across Mississippi?**

name: Team Kamala
subject: This is a good-news, bad-news kind of thing
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
Let’s start with the good news first: Kamala did an incredible job during this week’s debate. She showed yet again that she’s the best candidate to take on Donald Trump in the general election and she’s the right person to be our next president. It was a great night. **But here’s the bad news:** We just crunched the numbers, and we fell a bit short of hitting our July fundraising goal -- by roughly 10% of what we had anticipated. subject: quick note of thanks for you

body:
My friend,

Thank you so much for stepping up to help us meet our updated fundraising goal last month. I’m grateful to have your support.

We’re not accepting money from corporate PACs, so every dollar we raise really makes a difference to help us get our message out across the 22nd District, and because of you, we were able to hit the mark just before midnight on Wednesday.

My friend, I am proud to have you on our team. There’s so much at stake in this election, and I’m sure our campaign will be reaching out to you soon to keep our message moving forward. Thank you for your continued support, I couldn’t do it without you.

Thank you,

Sri Preston Kulkarni

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Record 157,288,000 Employed in July
body:
"The number of people employed in the United States hit a record 157,288,000 in July, according to the employment report released today." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f303536817&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Record 157,288,000 Employed in July**

“The number of people employed in the United States hit a record 157,288,000 in July, according to the employment report released today by the Bureau of Labor Statistics,” Terence Jeffrey reports for _CNSNews_.

“That was up 283,000 from the 157,005,000 employed in June.” The unemployment rate also held steady in July at 3.7 percent—a near-half century low.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=01749571ec&e=3ee4985eea)

**Council of Economic Advisers** : [Economy adds jobs as wages continue to grow](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e4296f8ad5&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “The Labor Department reported Friday that payrolls increased 164,000” last month, Jeff Cox reports for [CNBC](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=205ebbc400&e=3ee4985eea). “Wages also continued to increase, with the 3.2% year-over-year gain topping expectations by one-tenth of a percentage point . . . Despite simmering worries of a manufacturing slowdown, jobs in the sector increased by 16,000.”
---
|
---
| Yesterday, Kansas’ Laura Kelly became the first Democratic Governor to fully support the United States–Mexico–Canada Agreement (USMCA), drawing attention to its importance for her state’s trade, exports, and overall economy. “We need Congress to act. Ratifying USMCA, as well as improving relations with our trading partners around the globe, will benefit our agriculture sector and the economy as a whole,” she said in a [statement](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=28fef7550a&e=3ee4985eea).

**More** : [41 New York state legislators back USMCA as “a better deal for our country”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ca75ee8932&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “President Donald Trump launched a new attack on global trade rules last week in an attempt to get members of the World Trade Organization to agree to sweeping changes that would stop Chinese abuses of the international trading system. China’s exploitation of these loopholes is destroying a structure that has been vital to export industries in South Carolina and the rest of the United States,” [_The Post and Courier_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e2fb59a383&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| “The Mexican government says the number of U.S.-bound illegal migrants traveling through its country has decreased by 39% since May, a result of its bolstered enforcement efforts,” Jason Hopkins reports for [_The Daily Signal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bedaf4319d&e=3ee4985eea). “Marcelo Ebrard, Mexico’s foreign relations secretary, said Tuesday that the number of mostly Central American migrants traveling through the country to reach the U.S. dropped from 144,278 in May to 87,648 in June . . . Ebrard specifically credited Mexico’s recent crackdown on illegal immigration, brought on largely by pressure from the Trump administration.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=051714fe09&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=782aea445f&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=06194630de)
---

Earlier this week there were mass resignations at the DCCC after promises to increase diversity at the staff level went largely unfulfilled.

That's why Our Revolution is demanding a meeting with DCCC chair Cheri Bustos -- our party is better than her continued disregard for diversity.

[Add your name here to demand that DCCC senior leadership sit down with Our Revolution and other progressive groups to discuss ways to increase diversity at the staff level and the consultant level by ending the DCCC Blacklist.](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/dccc-blacklist?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=1+-+Add+your+name+here+to+demand+that+DCCC+s&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_180DO_190802_1_1&source=OR_EM_FR_180DO_190802_1_1")

subject: Beto’s tweet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
Beto tweeted something really important recently. Take a look:
#
Beto tweeted something _really_ important recently.
| **Beto O'Rourke** @BetoORourke
---|---
| | | Our campaign always has been, and always will be, powered by people. All people, no PACs.
All people, no special interests.
All people, all the time, every single day. [Chip in to help us meet the greatest challenges we have ever faced.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/21948?refcode=ema20190802-46536&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=46536%2E444211%2E87ESgK)
---
We say it all the time. All people, no PACs. But it’s not just a slogan.
Beto has rejected PAC money longer than anyone in the running to be president. He’s _never_ had his own super PAC (unlike some in this race!).
We do it this way because when we win the White House, we want the American people to know that Beto doesn’t owe anything to the special interests.
In order to keep up with the other candidates in this race, we need to raise a lot of money online from grassroots donors. More than half of it comes in from people clicking emails like this one. So we have to ask again today.
[Can you chip in $3 right now so we can build a stronger campaign in August — all without taking a dime from PACs or special interests?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/21948?refcode=ema20190802-46536&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=46536%2E444211%2E87ESgK)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/21948?refcode=ema20190802-46536&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=46536%2E444211%2E87ESgK)**
Hundreds of thousands of people have stepped up to own a piece of this grassroots campaign. Some of you have given two times or three times! When we come together, there is no amount of special interest money that can stop us.
Thanks for being a vital part of this campaign.
\- Team Beto

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

subject: so humbled
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|

Friend -- **Thank you, thank you, thank you for the birthday well-wishes!** Your support means the world to me, whether I've known you for years or if we've never met face to face (or at least, not yet). I took a quick campaign break to celebrate with my family, but now it’s back to work. **The energy here at Team Weld is palpable. I truly believe our campaign has the potential to make history, and I'm grateful to have you as a support system.** Thank you again for being a part of our movement. \--Bill [Contribute](https://www.weld2020.org/donate?utm_campaign=birthday_followup&utm_medium=email&utm_source=weld2020&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=19_08_02_birthday_follow_up&n=1)

| | Huge news: thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we reached our July fundraising goal!

Francis knows from his time serving in the Navy that it takes a team to get things done. That's why we needed people like you to step up and help while he's away -- and you did!

It's going to take all of us working together to bring fresh leadership to Central New York, especially since Francis is going up against a well-funded GOP opponent with access to unlimited special interest money.

So, truthfully, we couldn't do any of this without you. Thank you for being a part of this.

Talk soon,

Francis' Grassroots Team

P.S. To keep up with our campaign, like us on [**Facebook**](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b1b2/388db0e9/81644e2/609afd33/1094771818/VEsH/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://www.facebook.com/conole4congress/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=1+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=FC_EM_EN_90DO_190802_1_1&source=FC_EM_EN_90DO_190802_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_EN_90DO_190802_1_1") and follow us on [**Twitter**](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b1b2/388db0e9/81644e2/609afd32/1094771818/VEsE/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://twitter.com/Conole4Congress?lang=en&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=2+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=FC_EM_EN_90DO_190802_1_1&source=FC_EM_EN_90DO_190802_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_EN_90DO_190802_1_1").

| | **BREAKING: "MOSCOW MITCH" BLOCKS ELECTION SECURITY BILLS AFTER MUELLER TESTIMONY** **[50,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: Mueller 's testimony CONFIRMED Russian interference, but McConnell just BLOCKED critical election security bills that would protect us. Sign my emergency petition! >>](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4fa/18e32a7f/54a110e1/7bc934a8/3355414817/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/mueller-survey?source=20190802_em_pet_b1_mtvbrl_all")** | I cannot believe what I just witnessed.

Hours after Mueller himself confirmed Russia is interfering in our elections at this very moment -- _**Mitch McConnell BLOCKED Democrats ' legislation that would protect us.**_ [_**Quickly -- I need 50,000 signatures on my emergency petition demanding McConnell take IMMEDIATE action to protect our democracy. I will not allow a foreign government to influence another one of our elections. >> **_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4fa/18e32a7f/54a110e1/7bc934a8/3355414817/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/mueller-survey?source=20190802_em_pet_b1_mtvbrl_all") **NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com ** ** ** | **[SIGN YOUR NAME >>](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4fa/18e32a7f/54a110e1/7bc934a8/3355414817/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/mueller-survey?source=20190802_em_pet_b1_mtvbrl_all")**
---

I need you to know three critical things:

1\. Robert Mueller himself just confirmed Russians are interfering in our elections right now

2\. He warned this is the most serious challenge to our democracy he's ever seen

**3\. But I just watched Mitch McConnell BLOCK Democrats ' critical election security bill that would protect us**

Let me be clear.

Mitch McConnell is putting the very foundation of our democracy at stake.

And I won't for a second let him get away with it.

[_**I need an overwhelming response on my petition before midnight to demand McConnell bring House Democrats ' election security bill for a vote. Can I count on your immediate signature? >> **_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4fa/18e32a7f/54a110e1/7bc934a8/3355414817/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/mueller-survey?source=20190802_em_pet_b1_mtvbrl_all")

So much is at stake.

Thank you,
Ben Ray

subject: I will always put our working families first
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
Folks,

As President, I promise to always put the hardworking men and women of this country before corporate and special interests.

That's why I'm proposing a plan to double union membership and bring good jobs back to cities across the US.

[**Can I ask you to chip in $3 to make sure our hardworking communities are no longer left behind? I need to share this message with voters right away.**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-industrial-policy?recurring=true&amount=3&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190802_2_2&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+Can+I+ask+you+to+chip+in+ask+to+make+sur&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190802_2_2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190802_2_2")

The fight to increase union membership won't be easy. Making sure our forgotten communities, like mine in Youngstown, have the resources they need to succeed isn't just a part of my platform, it is the essential principle that has guided my career.

**Together, we can make sure that our tireless working families are given the respect, resources, and attention they deserve. Help me share my plan with voters right away by chipping in now:[https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/spreadtheword](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-industrial-policy?recurring=true&amount=3&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190802_2_2&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+httpssecuretimryanforamericacomspreadthe&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190802_2_2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190802_2_2")**

Thanks, team.

Tim

Citizens United was an attempt to hand over our democracy to dark money and special interests. It has had a toxic effect on our politics and continues to threaten the future of our republic.
This week, I stood with my Democratic colleagues and helped introduce a new constitutional amendment that would overturn Citizens United and get big money out of our politics for good.
**[Are you with me in the crucial fight to reverse Citizens United? subject: Democracy in action
body:
This week, I was so proud to help some great precinct committeemen -- the backbone of our party -- put democracy in action!We headed...

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/democracy-in-action?e=1acd9bb3d6)

Democracy in Action

This week, I was so proud to help some great precinct committeemen -- the backbone of our party -- put democracy in action!

We headed up to Marion in Grant County to hold a caucus to elect a new state representative for House District 31, with the resignation of former State Rep. Kevin Mahan. And I'm really excited to share with you that I'm confident that the district's pick to replace him, State Rep.-elect Ann Vermillion, will continue Rep. Mahan's (and, really, Republicans') tradition of delivering results.

Rep.- elect Vermillion graduated from Butler University, and then came back home. She built her career as administrative director of Marion General Hospital, and was successful at decreasing the number of opioid prescriptions written. I know she'll be a great partner to Governor Holcomb as he works to help more Hoosiers recover from the state's drug crisis.

Thanks to our great precinct committeemen for coming out on Tuesday, and to our county chairs in Blackford Delaware, Grant, and Wells counties! It's because of you that our state and our Republican Party continue to deliver results for Hoosiers each and every day!

-Kyle Hupfer

PHOTO: Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer and the region's legislators (former, current and future) and county chairs paused for a photo following the House District 31 caucus this week!
Governor Holcomb's Week That Was

Indiana: More Innovation & More Jobs!

Governor Eric Holcomb continues Putting People First -- making Indiana a leader in innovation and attracting record job commitments. And it happened again this week!

California-based insurance exchange company eHealth announced on Monday that it plans to locate its eastern headquarters in Indiana (https://www.theindychannel.com/news/hiring-hoosiers/health-services/california-based-insurance-exchange-plans-eastern-hq-in-indy?mc_cid=885495de76&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) . The company plans to invest more than $10 million into a new headquarters here and create 500 new, high-wage jobs. Exciting stuff!

On top of that, this week Governor Holcomb joined Purdue University as it hosted (https://www.wlfi.com/content/news/Holcomb-Hypersonics-is-Indianas-top-defense-priority-513390921.html?mc_cid=885495de76&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) The National Defense Industrial Association for its its inaugural Hypersonics Capabilities Conference. Hypersonic weapons are able to travel faster than the speed of sound, and are an important innovation that Indiana can lead.

Governor Holcomb said: "Hypersonics are Indiana's number one, top defense priority. We are exactly the kind of business-friendly state that is needed to expand the required research and development."

Under Governor Eric Holcomb's leadership, we continue to be the envy of the nation, not just in job creation, but in innovation as well.
Thank you, Dan Coats!

This week, our fellow Hoosier and former U.S. Senator Dan Coats announced he will be stepping down as Director of National Intelligence after nearly two years of serving in the Trump Administration.
Dan Coats has a track record of distinguished service -- serving Hoosiers in the U.S. House of Representatives for eight years, then putting in 18 years of service in the U.S. Senate, and also serving as our nation's ambassador to Germany.

He has been one of many Hoosiers to step up and serve not only our great state, but our nation -- and to show them the Indiana Way! Thank you, Dan Coats, for you service to our state and our country!

It's the Great Indiana State Fair!
The great Indiana State Fair -- the greatest 17 days of summer -- is ON! During your trip to the Indiana State Fair, make sure you stop by the Indiana Republican Party booth. You'll find us between the Free Stage and the Covered Bridge.

While you're at the Indiana Republican Party booth, grab a selfie with President Donald Trump and Vice President Mike Pence! Also, sign our petitions to get President Trump and Governor Eric Holcomb on the ballot in 2020!

And if you come on Monday, August 5 starting around 11 a.m., you can meet Congressman Greg Pence!

National Federation of Republican Women Convention
Coming to Indiana!

Save the date! The National Federation of Republican Women will be hosting their convention in Indianapolis this year on September 26-29. You’re invited to join them for their opening party – hosted by our own Indiana Federation of Republican Women – the evening of September 27 at the JW Marriott in downtown Indianapolis.

Learn more about the convention here (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0b9a27b539&e=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=885495de76&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , learn about sponsorship opportunities here (http://www.nfrw.org/convention-sponsorships?mc_cid=885495de76&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , and register to attend the national convention here (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=97df87c215&e=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=885495de76&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) !

subject: They want to lock kids up for months and months

body:

| | I'm furious. **Yesterday, the Republicans on the Senate Judiciary Committee advanced a plan that could keep little kids in Trump's prisons for up to 100 days. A HUNDRED DAYS.** Innocent children. In prison. For months and months, separated from their families. **Senate Democrats have a plan to protect these kids and stop the abuses, but Republicans wouldn't even allow a vote. They'd rather advance racist, harmful policies than listen to reason**. The bottom line: kids should be in schools, parks, and playgrounds, NOT prisons. We can do better than this. Everyone deserves to be treated with dignity and respect, no matter the color of their skin or where they come from. [**Join me on Facebook. Share this statement if you agree.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d8e1/6cd27893/503b0668/1580c0ad/339323215/VEsE/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.facebook.com/496696933682736/posts/2782227265129680") _Jeff_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d8e1/6cd27893/503b0668/1580c0aa/339323215/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ==/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-ron-wyden?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2019-08-02-kidsprison&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d8e1/6cd27893/503b0668/1580c0ab/339323215/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0=/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-ron-wyden?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2019-08-02-kidsprison&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d8e1/6cd27893/503b0668/1580c0a8/339323215/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-ron-wyden?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2019-08-02-kidsprison&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d8e1/6cd27893/503b0668/1580c0a9/339323215/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0=/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-ron-wyden?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2019-08-02-kidsprison&refcode2=express-buttons")

subject: I'm still in awe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, Every day I'm reminded that I can't do any of this alone. Recently, that feeling has been stronger than ever. I put my all into Wednesday's debate -- I hope you're proud of the way I represented this team. But from here on out, this race enters a new era. The DNC's rules limit the number of Democrats who will be on stage for the next debates. This gigantic field will start to winnow. After Wednesday night, I'm more confident than ever that this team has what it takes to win the nomination, defeat Donald Trump, and get to work to tackle some of our nation's biggest injustices. **This is the moment when underdog campaigns like ours need to make the most of our momentum and start to separate from the pack.** [**Let 's show we're in this for the long haul -- make a donation today.**](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190802-em3?refcode=em_fr_20190802_20190802-fr-CB-morningafter-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thank you for believing in me and this campaign we're building together. I can't tell you how much your support means. Cory
[](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190802-em3?refcode=em_fr_20190802_20190802-fr-CB-morningafter-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
